content:
$5,000 in Prizes Up For Grabs on Friday!,Get ready! The first monthly drawing, brought to you by Iris’ Blessing, is this Friday!  

It’s simple to get involved!
Add your wallet address using the Sola Qint bot in the ⁠🤖┃sola-qint-bot  channel,Redeem codes to earn tickets (Redeem in the Sola Qint channel or by typing /claim),All owned tickets are automatically entered into the drawing,Tune in  to see if you win!,
NEW HERE?
Use code "2Days" to grab 50 tickets to get started!

@everyone
